qa_pair.question: Use the fs_list_directory tool to list the current directory. How many TypeScript files (*.ts) are in the src/tools directory?
Read the package.json file and tell me what version the server is at.
Use shell_execute to run "echo Hello from MCP". What is the stdout output?
Use search_grep to find occurrences of "GITHUB_TOKEN" in the source code. What file contains this string in a console.error statement?
Read the first 20 lines of src/index.ts. What is the name of the constant SERVER_NAME?
Use fs_get_file_info on the README.md file. What is the file type returned?
Use search_find_definitions to find where the function "registerFilesystemTools" is defined. What file is it in?
Use shell_execute to run "git log --oneline -1" in the current directory. Does the command succeed (exit code 0)? Answer "yes" or "no".
Read the tsconfig.json file. What is the value of "target" in compilerOptions?
Use fs_search_files with pattern "*.json" and path ".". How many JSON files are found in the project root (not counting subdirectories)?
